understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate the character across the tile grid to reach the goal gem tile ('+'), which ends the level in a win, while avoiding lethal hazard tiles (spikes 'u'/'v') that cause an immediate loss when landed on.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal action (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT), which shifts the player one column and then automatically applies gravity in the current gravity direction until the character lands on a solid/support tile (o/m/w), hits a hazard (u/v), or reaches the goal (+). CLICK can be used on clickable/breakable tiles (e.g., 'x') by specifying a target_position [x, y]; a successful click removes that tile without moving the player and is typically used to open a fall path in the gravity direction. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move or click. Movement planning relies on predicting where a left/right move will ultimately land after gravity resolves and choosing routes that create useful vertical transitions while staying clear of spikes.
